race.comment: Open race with plenty of win chances but sticking with the handy SPIRIT OF BARTY (7). Won strongly on debut then placed in town before another break. Looks well placed here fresh and expected to go close. WANTED HILLBILLY (2) sat handy in the run last time and drew right away late to score a strong win. Aided by the claim and drawn to box seat. Can make it two on the trot. TINKERBELLA (8) is fitter for two runs back and is a third-up winner. Ready to win and sure to go very well. STRIKE WEAPON (3) is fitter for three runs back. Has the big claim and the speed to cross from a wide draw. Can give a sight at odds.
